summary: MVP smoke test on PalmMitra: All backend auth, payment (mock), report listing/retrieval, and frontend Landing/Auth/Upload flows work. CRITICAL BLOCKER: POST /api/palm/analyze returns 500 because EMERGENT_LLM_KEY has hit budget limit (litellm.BadRequestError: 'Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0, Max budget: 0.0'). This prevents any successful palm analysis and downstream full-report unlock verification.
passed: POST /api/auth/register -> 200 with token+user for new email; returns 400 'Email already registered' for existing email (expected)
POST /api/auth/login (demo@palmmitra.com/demo1234) -> 200 with JWT token; wrong password -> 401 'Invalid credentials'
GET /api/auth/me with Bearer -> 200 returns current user (user_22812a57b617)
GET /api/payment/plans -> 200 returns all 4 tiers (insight, match, plus, elite) with amount_inr/usd/name
GET /api/palm/reports -> 200 returns list of user's reports
POST /api/payment/create-order plan=insight -> 200 with order_id, amount=29900, mock=true, razorpay_key=null (as expected with empty Razorpay keys)
POST /api/payment/verify -> 200 {ok:true, unlocked:true}; subsequent GET report shows unlocked=true
Frontend Landing (/) loads with hero copy 'Discover what your palm reveals about your future.' and testids hero-analyze-btn, hero-sample-btn visible
Frontend /auth loads with testids google-signin-btn, auth-email-input, auth-password-input, auth-submit-btn, auth-mode-toggle; toggling changes submit text from 'Sign in' to 'Create account'
Frontend /upload loads with left-palm-dropzone, right-palm-dropzone, and upload-analyze-btn is DISABLED until an image is uploaded (as required)

failed.issue: POST /api/palm/analyze returns HTTP 500: 'AI analysis failed: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0, Max budget: 0.0'. The EMERGENT_LLM_KEY (sk-emergent-b1eA186F890A7Ee4e1) has zero budget available. Because analysis fails, we cannot verify: (a) initial locked=true + preview-only response, (b) full report JSON with the 14 required sections after unlock. The saved report has status='failed' and no analysis_data.
failed.evidence: curl POST /api/palm/analyze with real palm JPEG (44KB from pexels, base64 data URI) -> HTTP 500. Report record persisted as rpt_b7b948e9eff4 status=failed.

failed.issue: When report status='failed', GET /api/palm/reports/{id} returns locked=false even without payment. Likely because the code only sets locked=true when analysis_data exists. Not a blocker for MVP but worth flagging.

action_items: Top up / rotate EMERGENT_LLM_KEY so /api/palm/analyze can call GPT-5.2 successfully. Retest the full flow: analyze -> locked+preview -> pay (mock) -> unlocked+full report with all 14 sections (personality, career, money, love, marriage, family, health, strengths, weaknesses, lucky_years, life_timeline, recommendations, action_plan, summary).
Optional: consider setting locked=true when status='failed' OR surface the error UI-side so users don't see an empty unlocked-but-broken report.

success_rate.backend: 89% (8/9 core endpoints; palm/analyze blocked by external LLM budget)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (Landing, Auth, Upload smoke checks all pass)
